---
title: "Intervention effects"
abstract: "Draft scaffold; ITT results narrative pending."
---

::: {.callout-note}
Drafted by a LLM-based AI tool (Codex/GPT-5).
:::

This chapter is not yet a reviewed results narrative. Do not infer intervention effects from this placeholder; use the fitted ITT model reports and their convergence banners, posterior summaries, ROPE summaries, and prior-sensitivity outputs before drafting study-level claims.
